instructions.title: RECREATE campaigns (zernio timeout FIXED - fire once)
instructions.instruction:
MASTER RELAUNCH RUNBOOK (idempotent) - the previous 2 campaigns were DELETED by accident. RECREATE both campaigns REUSING the already-generated creatives. Do NOT re-plan. TWO SEPARATE campaigns - different pixel, different creatives, NEVER shared. Both LIVE at exactly RM4/day each. Objective = website SALES -> Purchase. 6 ads per brand (1 poster + 5 video). EXACTLY 6 ads per campaign, no more.

STEP 0 - RECOVER THE 12 ASSET URLS (do NOT regenerate if you can recover them):
- Read _shared/reports/launch.md and search every file under _shared/ for peninglab asset URLs from the prior run.
- If peninglab exposes a generation-history / list / get_status tool, use it to retrieve the recently generated image + video URLs.
- Map them to 12 slots: PeningBot = PB-P (poster), PB-V1..PB-V5 (video); PeningLab = PL-P (poster), PL-V1..PL-V5 (video).
- ONLY regenerate a slot whose URL you genuinely cannot recover. Regenerate via Fire-and-Poll (poll get_status by task_id, NEVER double-fire a slot). Posters = gpt-image-2, 1:1. Videos = gemini, 10s, vertical 9:16, spoken Bahasa Melayu, no subtitles. Use the EXACT visual + dialogue + copy pairing below so a regenerated asset matches its copy.

=== PENINGBOT (WhatsApp-green #25D366, Bahasa Melayu) ===
PB-P POSTER - VISUAL: "Clean 1:1 us-vs-them table, dark bg + WhatsApp-green #25D366. Columns 'Balas Manual' vs 'PeningBot'. Rows: Reply 2 jam / 2 saat; After-hours Tutup / 24 jam; Sales Rugi / Closing automatik. Bold Malay text, safe zone, no watermark." COPY: primary="Balas lambat = customer lari. PeningBot jawab automatik 24 jam, tangkap setiap lead. Setup 5 minit, dari RM35/bulan." headline="Stop kehilangan sales lewat malam"
PB-V1 VIDEO - VISUAL: "MY male SME owner 30s in a small shop, phone in hand, warm daylight, handheld, film grain." DIALOGUE(BM): "Penat balas WhatsApp sampai pukul 3 pagi? PeningBot balas customer automatik 24 jam dalam 2 saat. Cuba di peningbot dot com." COPY: primary="Owner kedai? Berhenti balas WhatsApp sorang-sorang. Auto-reply 24/7, dari RM35." headline="Auto-reply 24/7 - 5 minit setup"
PB-V2 VIDEO - VISUAL: "POV dark bedroom 3am, phone buzzing 99+ unread WhatsApp + red badges, owner stirring. Cinematic." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Customer WhatsApp tengah malam, esok dah beli kat orang lain. Jangan biar sales lari masa kau tidur." COPY: primary="Customer tanya tengah malam - PeningBot jawab automatik dalam 2 saat. Dari RM35/bulan." headline="Jangan hilang sales masa tidur"
PB-V3 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Split: LEFT stressed owner replying non-stop all day; RIGHT same owner relaxed while phone auto-replies. Warm." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Dulu balas WhatsApp sampai penat. Sekarang PeningBot buat automatik. Aku boleh rehat." COPY: primary="Stop balas WhatsApp sorang-sorang sepanjang hari. PeningBot auto-reply 24/7." headline="Rehat - bot yang balas"
PB-V4 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Screen-record WhatsApp chat: PeningBot auto-replies a customer, then notification 'Sale closed: RM120'. Clean UI, green accents." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Tengok - PeningBot balas customer automatik, tapis lead, dan beritahu bila ada closing." COPY: primary="Auto-reply + tangkap lead + notify bila closing. Setup 5 minit." headline="Closing automatik di WhatsApp"
PB-V5 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Relatable MY shop owner speaking casually to camera, authentic UGC style, daylight." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Dulu aku rugi sebab lambat balas. Lepas guna PeningBot, customer dibalas dalam saat. Sales naik." COPY: primary="73% usahawan rugi sebab lambat balas WhatsApp. PeningBot selesaikan - dari RM35." headline="Balas dalam saat, bukan jam"

=== PENINGLAB (dark #0a0a0a + orange #f97316 + lime #c8f53e, Bahasa Melayu) ===
PL-P POSTER - VISUAL: "Bold 1:1 split, dark bg + orange/lime. LEFT BEFORE: tired creator 'RM500 . 1 minggu . 1 video'. RIGHT AFTER: phone grid of 10 TikTok thumbnails 'RM0.40 . 3 minit . 10 video'. Energetic Malay, safe zone, no watermark." COPY: primary="Bayar RM300 untuk 1 video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. RM0.40 sebijik." headline="10 video UGC dalam 3 minit"
PL-V1 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Screen-record, dark UI orange accents: a hand pastes a TikTok Shop link, then 10 UGC video thumbnails generate rapidly." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Bayar RM300 untuk satu video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit, RM0.40 sebijik. Cuba di peninglab dot com." COPY: primary="Generate 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. RM0.40 sebijik. Mula RM35/bulan." headline="10 video / 3 minit"
PL-V2 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Split montage: a competitor rapidly posting 10 AI videos vs a tired seller filming one manually. Energetic, dark/orange." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Kompetitor post 10 video sehari guna AI. Kau masih shoot manual? Macam mana nak lawan?" COPY: primary="Kompetitor mass-post guna AI. Generate 10 video sehari, RM0.40 sebijik. Scale TikTok Shop kau." headline="Scale dengan AI"
PL-V3 VIDEO - VISUAL: "Screen-record: paste a link, pick an avatar persona, 10 finished UGC videos ready to download. Slick dark/orange UI." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Paste link, pilih avatar, dapat 10 video UGC siap post. Semua dalam 3 minit." COPY: primary="Auto-generate 10 UGC video dari satu link TikTok Shop. Tak payah shoot, tak payah edit." headline="Dari link ke 10 video"
PL-V4 VIDEO - VISUAL: "A relaxed young MY creator sipping coffee while a phone shows TikTok Shop sales notifications rising. Warm, energetic." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Buat duit affiliate sambil minum kopi. Generate 10 video sehari, scale TikTok Shop jadi RM10k sebulan." COPY: primary="Post lebih banyak, jual lebih banyak. 10 video UGC sehari dengan AI. Mula RM35." headline="Scale TikTok Shop jadi RM10k/bulan"
PL-V5 VIDEO - VISUAL: "An AI avatar (hijab option) confidently presenting a product, studio look, dark/orange." DIALOGUE(BM VO): "Tak nak depan camera? Guna AI avatar, hijab pun ada. 10 video UGC, 3 minit." COPY: primary="Malu depan camera? AI avatar buat untuk kau - hijab option ada. 10 video, 3 minit." headline="UGC tanpa depan camera"

STEP 1 - RESOLVE via zernio: accounts_list_accounts(platform=metaads) -> social account _id; ads_list_ad_accounts -> MYR account act_943036532064443 ('Pening'); connect_list_facebook_pages -> page id of 'bisnesowner2021'. Then ad_campaigns_list_ad_campaigns to confirm the old campaigns are gone.

STEP 2 - CREATE PENINGBOT campaign (zernio ads_create_standalone_ad): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'986352420917190', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 986352420917190; budget_amount=4 budget_type=daily budget_level=campaign (CBO); countries=['MY'] age_min=25 age_max=45 broad (NO detailed interests); page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peningbot.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 6 ads = PB-P, PB-V1..PB-V5, each using ITS OWN recovered asset + ITS OWN paired primary/headline. Campaign name 'PeningBot - Sales - relaunch'.

STEP 3 - CREATE PENINGLAB campaign (SEPARATE): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'1013990424497184', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 1013990424497184; budget RM4/day CBO; countries=['MY'] age_min=22 age_max=40 broad; page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peninglab.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 6 ads = PL-P, PL-V1..PL-V5, each with its own recovered asset + paired copy. Campaign name 'PeningLab - Sales - relaunch'. (If 'LEARN_MORE' rejected, use 'SIGN_UP'.)

IDEMPOTENCY RULES - CRITICAL, this prevents the duplicate-ads bug from last time:
1. Create each campaign's 6 ads in ONE pass only.
2. ads_create_standalone_ad is SLOW (~90s) and may RETURN A TIMEOUT ERROR EVEN THOUGH THE AD WAS ACTUALLY CREATED. So on ANY error or timeout from ads_create_standalone_ad, DO NOT recreate that ad. Instead call ads_list_ads for that campaign and check whether an ad for that creative already exists; create it ONLY if it is genuinely missing.
3. After both campaigns are built, call ads_list_ads once per campaign. Each campaign MUST end with EXACTLY 6 ads. If a campaign has MORE than 6 (duplicates), DELETE the extras so only one of each creative remains. If FEWER than 6, create only the missing slots (one attempt each, then verify by listing - NEVER blind-retry in a loop).
4. Then STOP. Do not re-verify by re-creating. Do not loop.

STEP 4 - NOTIFY+LOG: WhatsApp owner via whacenter (number $WHACENTER_DEFAULT_TO): one message 'RELAUNCH LIVE: PeningBot + PeningLab recreated (separate campaigns), 6 ads each, RM4/day, Sales. Campaign ids: ...'. Append a full report WITH all 12 asset URLs to _shared/reports/launch.md.

HARD RULES: two SEPARATE campaigns; never share pixel/creative; REUSE existing creatives, regenerate only the ones you cannot recover; EXACTLY 6 ads per campaign; both LIVE at exactly RM4/day; NO blind retries - always list-then-create; STOP when each campaign has 6 ads.
